design-system-colors--documentation.name: Documentation
design-system-colors--documentation.title: Design-system/Colors
design-system-colors--documentation.content:
import { Meta, ColorPalette, ColorItem } from '@storybook/addon-docs/blocks';

import theme from './theme.tsx';

<Meta title='Design-system/Colors' />


<ColorPalette>
  <ColorItem
    title='theme.colors.grey'
    subtitle='Grey'
    colors={[...theme.colors.grey.map((grey) => grey)]}
  />
  <ColorItem
    title='theme.colors.blue'
    subtitle='Blue'
    colors={[...theme.colors.blue.map((blue) => blue)]}
  />
  <ColorItem
    title='theme.colors.indigo'
    subtitle='Indigo'
    colors={[...theme.colors.indigo.map((indigo) => indigo)]}
  />
  <ColorItem
    title='theme.colors.purple'
    subtitle='Purple'
    colors={[...theme.colors.purple.map((purple) => purple)]}
  />
  <ColorItem
    title='theme.colors.red'
    subtitle='Red'
    colors={[...theme.colors.red.map((red) => red)]}
  />
  <ColorItem
    title='theme.colors.green'
    subtitle='Green'
    colors={[...theme.colors.green.map((green) => green)]}
  />
  <ColorItem
    title='theme.colors.yellow'
    subtitle='Yellow'
    colors={[...theme.colors.yellow.map((yellow) => yellow)]}
  />
  <ColorItem
    title='theme.colors.pink'
    subtitle='Pink'
    colors={[...theme.colors.pink.map((pink) => pink)]}
  />
</ColorPalette>

design-system-typography--documentation.name: Documentation
design-system-typography--documentation.title: Design-system/Typography
design-system-typography--documentation.content:
import { Meta, Typeset } from '@storybook/addon-docs/blocks';
import { typography } from './typography';

<Meta title='Design-system/Typography' />

**Font:** Montserrat

**Weights:** 400(regular), 700(bold), 800(extrabold), 900(black)

<Typeset
  fontSizes={[
    Number(typography.size.s1),
    Number(typography.size.s2),
    Number(typography.size.s3),
    Number(typography.size.m1),
    Number(typography.size.m2),
    Number(typography.size.m3),
    Number(typography.size.l1),
    Number(typography.size.l2),
    Number(typography.size.l3),
  ]}
  fontWeight={typography.weight.regular}
  sampleText='Typography samples'
/>
